title: Yellow Pages Scraper
description: Scrapes business listings from yellowpages.com with browser-based navigation and block detection.

search_query.title: Search Query
search_query.description: Type of business to search for (e.g. 'pizza', 'plumber', 'dentist').

search_location.title: Search Location
search_location.description: City and state to search in (e.g. 'Los Angeles, CA', 'New York, NY').

max_businesses.title: Max Businesses
max_businesses.description: Maximum number of business records to collect. The scraper stops queueing new businesses after this limit.

headless.title: Headless Browser
headless.description: Run browser in headless mode. Set to false for local debugging (shows browser window).

use_apify_proxy.title: Use Apify Proxy
use_apify_proxy.description: Enable Apify Proxy for requests. Strongly recommended to avoid blocks.

proxy_groups.title: Proxy Groups
proxy_groups.description: Apify Proxy groups to use. RESIDENTIAL is recommended for Yellow Pages.

proxy_country.title: Proxy Country
proxy_country.description: Two-letter ISO country code for proxy exit node (e.g. 'US', 'GB').

max_cf_retries.title: Max Cloudflare Retries
max_cf_retries.description: How many times to retry a URL if Cloudflare challenge does not clear.

cf_wait_seconds.title: Cloudflare Wait Timeout (seconds)
cf_wait_seconds.description: How long to wait for a Cloudflare challenge to clear before giving up.

cf_refresh_attempts.title: Cloudflare Refresh Attempts
cf_refresh_attempts.description: How many times to refresh a blocked search/results page before retrying the request.

use_homepage_search.title: Use Homepage Search
use_homepage_search.description: Open yellowpages.com first, type the query/location into the search form, and submit it for the first results page.

page_gap_seconds.title: Page Gap Seconds
page_gap_seconds.description: Random wait range between navigations, as [minimum, maximum] seconds.

session_id.title: Proxy Session ID
session_id.description: Optional fixed proxy session ID for consistent IP across requests. Auto-generated if left blank.

fingerprint_seed.title: Fingerprint Seed
fingerprint_seed.description: Optional seed string to deterministically pick a browser fingerprint. Auto-generated if blank.

cloudflare_cookies.title: Cloudflare Cookies
cloudflare_cookies.description: Optional JSON array of cookies from a manually solved Cloudflare challenge. Paste the full cookies array exported from your browser.
